list.title: System Configuration

schema.invalidValue: Configuration Value Does Not Match the Field Rules
schema.belowMinimum: Configuration Value Must Be at Least {minimum}
schema.aboveMaximum: Configuration Value Must Be at Most {maximum}
schema.belowMinLength: Configuration Value Must Be at Least {minLength} Characters
schema.aboveMaxLength: Configuration Value Must Be at Most {maxLength} Characters

advanced.title: Advanced Information
advanced.copyError: Configuration Key Could Not Be Copied.

groupDescriptions.dashboardQuickActions: Manage Dashboard Home Quick-Action Visibility and Ranking.
groupDescriptions.coreHttpxLogRetention: Manage Access Log Cleanup Retention and Batch Policy.
groupDescriptions.coreLoggerLogRetention: Manage Application Log Cleanup Retention and Batch Policy.
groupDescriptions.auditLogRetention: Manage Audit Log Cleanup Retention and Batch Policy.

dashboardQuickActions.title: Dashboard Quick Actions
dashboardQuickActions.description: Dashboard Home Quick-Action Visibility and Ranking Defaults.

accessLogRetentionCleanup.title: Access Log Retention Cleanup
accessLogRetentionCleanup.description: Default Cleanup Configuration for Access-Log Retention Jobs.

appLogRetentionCleanup.title: App Log Retention Cleanup
appLogRetentionCleanup.description: Default Cleanup Configuration for App-Log Retention Jobs.

auditLogRetentionCleanup.title: Audit Log Retention Cleanup
auditLogRetentionCleanup.description: Default Cleanup Configuration for Audit-Log Retention Jobs.

retention_days.title: Notification Retention Days
retention_days.description: Number of days notification records should be retained.

default_page_size.title: Default Page Size
default_page_size.description: Default page size used by Notification Center.

enabled.title: System Announcement Notifications
enabled.description: Enables notifications created from published system announcements.

enabled.title: Scheduled Task Failure Notifications
enabled.description: Enables notifications for failed scheduled task runs.

enabled.title: Scheduled Task Success Notifications
enabled.description: Enables notifications for successful manual scheduled task runs.

enabled.title: Audit Incident Notifications
enabled.description: Enables notifications for audit events that require security review.

enabled.title: System Config Change Notifications
enabled.description: Enables notifications for system configuration changes, resets, and validation failures.

enabled.title: Access Log Retention Failure Notifications
enabled.description: Enables notifications for access-log retention cleanup failures.

enabled.title: In-App Delivery Enabled
enabled.description: Whether Notification Center should create in-app delivery records.

dedupe_window_seconds.title: Dedupe Window Seconds
dedupe_window_seconds.description: Dedupe window for same source, target, and business object notifications.

max_batch_recipients.title: Max Batch Recipients
max_batch_recipients.description: Maximum recipients in one notification delivery batch.

showReadDays.title: Show Read Days
showReadDays.description: Default time window for showing read notifications.

popupLimit.title: Popup Limit
popupLimit.description: Maximum notifications displayed by the notification bell popup.

runtime.title: Container Runtime
runtime.description: Runtime adapter used by container management.

enabled.title: Container Runtime Access Enabled
enabled.description: Whether container management may access the configured runtime.

endpoint.title: Container Runtime Endpoint
endpoint.description: Local runtime endpoint used by the first container adapter.

default_tail.title: Default Log Tail
default_tail.description: Default number of log lines returned by container log reads.

max_tail.title: Maximum Log Tail
max_tail.description: Maximum number of log lines allowed for container log reads.

dangerous_enabled.title: Dangerous Container Actions Enabled
dangerous_enabled.description: Whether start, stop, restart, and future high-risk actions are enabled.

compose_level.title: Compose Action Policy
compose_level.description: Controls dangerous action behavior for compose-managed containers.

swarm_level.title: Swarm Action Policy
swarm_level.description: Controls dangerous action behavior for swarm-managed containers.

kubernetes_level.title: Kubernetes Action Policy
kubernetes_level.description: Controls dangerous action behavior for kubernetes-managed containers.

unknown_level.title: Unknown Source Action Policy
unknown_level.description: Controls dangerous action behavior for containers with unclassified managed sources.

policy.title: Environment Value Display Policy
policy.description: Controls How Container Environment Variable Values Are Returned by Detail Reads.

hidden.label: Hidden
hidden.description: Return Only Environment Variable Names and Sensitivity Metadata.

masked.label: Masked
masked.description: Mask Sensitive Environment Variable Values and Show Non-Sensitive Values.

plain.label: Plain
plain.description: Return Environment Variable Values Without Policy Masking.

masked_copy_enabled.title: Allow Copying Real Sensitive Environment Values
masked_copy_enabled.description: When enabled, users with environment read access can copy real sensitive environment values from the container detail page, including the environment list, Copy .env, and raw JSON copy, while the UI still displays *****. When disabled, sensitive values remain masked and cannot be copied in raw form.

retentionDays.title: Log Retention Days
retentionDays.description: Delete Logs Older Than This Many Days.

batchSize.title: Batch Size
batchSize.description: Maximum Rows Deleted per Cleanup Batch.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Controls Whether Personalized Dashboard Quick Actions Are Shown.

maxItems.title: Maximum Items
maxItems.description: Maximum Personalized Entries Shown on the Dashboard Home Page.

dashboardQuickActionStrategyDescriptions.mostUsed: Prioritize the Quick Actions Used Most Often.
dashboardQuickActionStrategyDescriptions.recent: Prioritize Quick Actions Visited Most Recently.
dashboardQuickActionStrategyDescriptions.hybrid: Rank by Recent Visits, Usage Frequency, and System Recommendations.

systemConfig.groups.notification.general: Control the Notification Center baseline behavior.
systemConfig.groups.notification.sources: Control which platform events create notifications.
systemConfig.groups.notification.deliver: Control in-app delivery and fan-out limits.
systemConfig.groups.ops.container.runtim: Control the local container runtime adapter.
Manage access and security boundaries for interactive container shell sessions.
systemConfig.groups.ops.container.action: Control container start, stop, and restart actions.
systemConfig.container.ops.container.she: Controls whether interactive container shell session tickets and WebSocket connections can be created.
systemConfig.container.ops.container.res: Controls how long container resource snapshots stay fresh before the next stats refresh is required.
Controls how long stale container resource snapshots may be served while the next stats refresh runs in the background.
